description: Call GET /api/v1/google/maps/photos for Google SERP Maps Photos through Just Serp API with data_id.

operations.description: Get Google maps Photos data, including related metadata, for visual location research and listing QA.

parameters.description: The unique Google Maps location ID (feature ID). You can get this from our Google Maps Search API.
parameters.name: data_id

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: The unique ID for a photo category (e.g., 'Interior', 'Exterior'). Found in previous Maps Photos API responses.
parameters.name: category_id

parameters.description: Token for retrieving the next page of photo results.
parameters.name: next_page_token

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
